description: External imported ONNX classifier-tail set used to validate non-GEMM terminal lowering via Softmax.

fetch.notes: Commit-pinned imported classifier ONNX from chris-chris/mina-zkml.

models.notes: Cast -> Gemm -> Softmax probability path with auxiliary ArgMax/Gather label branch. Campaign lowers the Softmax probability output and ignores the label side output. Uses mapper batch override 256.
